summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 增强了 Code Server / VS Code 相关入口和集成能力，让打开代码与进入开发环境更顺畅。
summary.en: Change Summary: Improved Code Server / VS Code entry points and integration to make opening code and entering the dev environment smoother.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

Code Server / VS Code 相关入口和集成能力

  • 变更说明: 增强了 Code Server / VS Code 相关入口和集成能力，让打开代码与进入开发环境更顺畅。
  • 影响范围: 影响 vscode-server 相关功能、vault 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

会话、消息和运行状态相关体验

  • 变更说明: 增强了会话、消息和运行状态相关体验，让上下文查看与过程反馈更清晰。
  • 影响范围: 影响 会话流程、vscode-server 相关功能、vscode 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持

  • 变更说明: 补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持，提升整体功能可用性。
  • 影响范围: 影响 game-driver 相关功能、signalr 相关功能、角色与职业元数据。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

sync game scene cards when progress data changes相关问题。

  • 变更说明: 修复了sync game scene cards when progress data changes相关问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 看板与项目视图、game-driver 相关功能、客户端状态处理。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。

fix z-index stacking for floating UI layers相关问题。

  • 变更说明: 修复了fix z-index stacking for floating UI layers相关问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 driverjs 相关功能、i18n 相关功能、game-driver 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

Code Server / VS Code entry points

  • Change Summary: Improved Code Server / VS Code entry points and integration to make opening code and entering the dev environment smoother.
  • Impact: Affects Vscode Server, Vault.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Session

  • Change Summary: Enhanced session, message, and runtime visibility to make context and progress easier to follow.
  • Impact: Affects session workflows, Vscode Server, Vscode.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing session entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Supporting work

  • Change Summary: Added supporting work across configuration, APIs, and localization to improve overall feature readiness.
  • Impact: Affects Game Driver, Signalr, hero and role metadata.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Issues related

  • Change Summary: Fixed issues related to sync game scene cards when progress data changes.
  • Impact: Affects kanban and project views, Game Driver, client state handling.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing issues related entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: This item also includes supporting stability or cleanup work so the visible behavior stays reliable under the updated flow.

Issues related

  • Change Summary: Fixed issues related to fix z-index stacking for floating UI layers.
  • Impact: Affects Driverjs, I18n, kanban and project views.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing issues related entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: No additional migration step is expected; this version mainly improves the reliability of the existing flow.
